texto: Conversely, the red plant itself burns a brighter red when set off by the green than when it grows among its peers. In the bed I always reserved for poinsettia seedlings, there was little to distinguish one plant from its neighbours. My poinsettia did not turn scarlet until I planted it in new surroundings. Colour is not something one has, colour is bestowed on one by others.
explicacao: Citação de Arthur Japin sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Conversely, the red plant itself burns a brighter red when set off by the green than when it grow…” articula autoestima, colour, ethnicity em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como ethnicity e poinsettia.

In the bed I always reserved for poinsettia seedlings, there was little to distinguish one plant from its neighbours. My poinsettia did not turn scarlet until I planted it in new surroundings. texto: If you accept others as equals, you embrace them unconditionally, now and forever. But if you let them know that you tolerate them, you suggest in the same breath that they are actually an inconvenience, like a nagging pain or an unpleasant odour you are willing to disregard.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Arthur Japin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “If you accept others as equals, you embrace them unconditionally, now and forever. But if you let…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, acceptance, tolerance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de tolerance.

texto: Veel van wat aanvankelijk alleen in de verbeelding bestaat, wordt werkelijkheid.
explicacao: Citação de Arthur Japin sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Veel van wat aanvankelijk alleen in de verbeelding bestaat, wordt werkelijkheid.” articula reflexao, philosophy, aanvankelijk em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
